chapter1__start: Hey 💕 I've been waiting for you, my love!
chapter1__1: You look surprised... I can't blame you, it's not something that happens often, right? haha
chapter1_1_option1: Seriously.. what are you up to?
chapter1_1_option2: Not at all. Are you okay?
chapter1__2: You got me haha I thought this music in the background would be really nice. What did you think?
chapter1__3: I prepared a few little things for you. I had planned to do this on Valentine's Day, but I ended up running a little late. Women's Day was perfect, especially since you are an amazing woman.
chapter1__4: Ha ha... silly. Anyway, moving on...
chapter1__5: I'm happy ❤️ you are the love of my life, and I wanted to remind you of that. I planned to do this on Valentine's Day, but things didn't go exactly as planned. Since you are a wonderful woman, I'm glad it's on Women's Day.
chapter1__6: You know, have I ever told you how much I like the color of your eyes? Their brown-green are two wonderful jewels.
chapter1__7: Haha... but I haven't even started...
chapter1__8: Brown-green, my love. Of course, you know how rare they are, and I love just staring at them.
chapter1__9: Before anything else, I wanted to remind you how much I love you and that...
chapter1__10: You are a wonderful woman. I'll try to sum it up: beautiful, amazing, goddess of my life, transcendent, hypnotizing, delicious, fragrant, creamy...
chapter1__11: Aaah, but I want to say with every possible word how much I love and admire you.
chapter1__12: You know, I can hardly wait for the day I stop calling you fiancée, and start calling you my wife 🩵
chapter1__13: But of course. I know that better than anyone.
chapter1__14: You make me like this. I know that as time goes by, trust in each other grows more and more. I also know that often routine makes things a little... monotonous
chapter1__15: I want to be your unconditional partner, and I will ALWAYS be here for you 🩵
chapter1__16: That's why I want to remind you how special you are, and how wonderful our life is.
chapter1__17: Anyway, I'm dragging this on here
chapter1__18: Could you pop into the bedroom? I have a gift for you.
chapter2__19: Before you open it, I'd like to say that besides knowing you wanted this, it serves a purpose much bigger than that.
chapter2__21: Open it, please! I'm anxious to see what you'll think
chapter2__22: Our most important moments need to be recorded, don't you think?
chapter2_22_option2: This is the best way to capture it ❤️
chapter2__23: I knew you'd like it. It's been so long that you wanted it, right? You look so beautiful happy 🥰
chapter2__24: Isn't it? What do you think about taking our first photo? Let's start recording our memories 🥰
chapter2__26: Don't worry, my love. If it doesn't turn out good, we'll take another!
chapter2__28: Our first polaroid together ❤️ of many. I just imagine you and Dri having fun with it, haha
chapter2__29: Let's take another then. It's not very easy to take a selfie with it, right?
chapter2__30: I bought it a while ago, and I was waiting for the right moment to give it to you.
chapter2_30_option1: I saw you were planning something...
chapter2_30_option2: I loved it, love. So, what about tonight's special dinner...
chapter2__31: Yes haha you got me. The dinner is part of this little surprise. I had planned to take you out, but since we're clumsy we have few resources
chapter2_31_option1: The important thing is the intention 🤗
chapter2_31_option2: Oh don't worry, I'm sure it will be delicious ❤️
chapter2__32: I'm glad you think that way. Rest assured I'll put effort into it ❤️
chapter2__33: Aww, thank you love ❤️ I'll try hard, I hope it turns out good too.
chapter2__34: Now, I need to go to the kitchen to prepare our special dinner. See you in a bit, my love!
